Klasse TrainType

java.lang.Object
de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.TrainType
public class TrainType extends Object
Represents a classification of trains with shared operational characteristics. Train types define categories like ICE (high-speed), Regional Express, etc., each with specific speed factors, pricing multipliers, and seating capacity.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    TrainType(int id, String description, String category, double speedFactor, double priceFactor, int seatCount)
    Creates a new train type with all operational characteristics.

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode

    String

    Gets the category classification.
    String
    getDescription()
    Gets the descriptive name of the train type.

    Gets the train type's unique identifier.

    getPriceFactor()
    Gets the price factor for this train type.
    int

    Gets the maximum seating capacity.
    double
    getSpeedFactor()
    Gets the speed factor for this train type.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • TrainType

      public TrainType(int id, String description, String category, double speedFactor, double priceFactor, int seatCount)
      Creates a new train type with all operational characteristics.
      Parameter:
      id - the unique train type identifier
      description - the descriptive name of this train type
      category - the category classification
      speedFactor - the speed multiplier (higher = faster)
      priceFactor - the pricing multiplier (higher = more expensive)
      seatCount - the maximum seating capacity

  • Methodendetails

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Gets the train type's unique identifier.
      Gibt zurück:
      the train type ID

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets the descriptive name of the train type.
      Gibt zurück:
      the description

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Gets the category classification.
      Gibt zurück:
      the category

    • getSpeedFactor

      public double getSpeedFactor()
      Gets the speed factor for this train type. Higher values indicate faster trains.
      Gibt zurück:
      the speed factor

    • getPriceFactor

      public double getPriceFactor()
      Gets the price factor for this train type. Used as a multiplier in journey cost calculations.
      Gibt zurück:
      the price factor

    • getSeatCount

      public int getSeatCount()
      Gets the maximum seating capacity.
      Gibt zurück:
      the seat count
